system.flavor: Your skin develops a swirling iron shell. When struck, it hardens and intensifies.
system.effect:
Stance you enter this stance, gain a d6 power die, starting at 1. Once a turn, but any number of times a round, tick it up by 1 after a foe uses an ability that damages you. At 4+, you take half damage from all sources. At the end of any turn the die is at 6, discard it. At the start of your turn, if you don't have a die, gain a new die at 1.
Heavy the die at 3.
